description.message: Take YouTube notes directly to Notion, generate AI flashcards, capture screenshots, and sync learning courses with Notion

name.message: YouTube Notes to Notion with Udemy, Coursera, BiliBili and more by Snipo

commands1.message: Timestamp | If not set, is mod+shift+k

commands2.message: Screenshots | If not set, is mod+shift+,

commands3.message: Pause | If not set, is mod+shift+space

commands4.message: Seek backward by seconds | If not set, is mod+shift+8

commands5.message: Seek forward by seconds | If not set, is mod+shift+9

commands6.message: Increase video speed | If not set, is mod+shift+0

commands7.message: Decrease video speed | If not set, is mod+shift+7

commands8.message: Transcript range | If not set, mod+shift+.

commands9.message: Video clip | If not set, mod+shift+y
